subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath is a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old.
source_quote: Daran Edermath, a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath formerly served as a marshal and herald on the Dragon Coast.
source_quote: who formerly served as a marshal and herald on the Dragon Coast

subject: Pip
fact: Daran Edermath praised Pip's dedication to doing good.
source_quote: praised Pip's dedication to doing good

subject: Red Brands
fact: Daran Edermath expressed concern about the Red Brands.
source_quote: Daran confirmed concern about the Red Brands

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands.
source_quote: confront their leader, Glasstaff

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: The Red Brands' safehouse is located beneath Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: the Red Brands' safehouse is located beneath Tresendar Manor

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Tresendar Manor is a rundown building past the Sleeping Giant.
source_quote: a rundown building past the Sleeping Giant

subject: Red Brands
fact: Daran Edermath estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands are at Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands at Tresendar Manor

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Prospectors in the hills northwest of Phandalin have been chased from Old Owl Well by undead creatures.
source_quote: prospectors in the hills northwest of Phandalin have been chased from the ruins known as Old Owl Well by undead creatures

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Daran Edermath identified Old Owl Well as an ancient watchtower of the magical empire Netheril.
source_quote: identified Old Owl Well as an ancient watchtower of the magical empire Netheril

subject: Netheril
fact: Netheril is a magical empire.
source_quote: magical empire Netheril

subject: boots of striding and springing
fact: Daran Edermath offered boots of striding and springing as a reward for investigating Old Owl Well.
source_quote: offered boots of striding and springing as a reward for investigating Old Owl Well

subject: Gundren
fact: Daran Edermath urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests.
source_quote: urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests

subject: Shrine of Luck
fact: The Shrine of Luck is Phandalin's only temple.
source_quote: Phandalin's only temple, the Shrine of Luck

subject: Tymora
fact: The Shrine of Luck is dedicated to Tymora, the god of good luck and fortune.
source_quote: dedicated to Tymora, the god of good luck and fortune

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The Shrine of Luck is tended by a zealous young elf acolyte.
source_quote: tended by a zealous young elf acolyte

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The elf acolyte recognized the party as those searching for Gundren.
source_quote: recognized the party as those searching for Gundren

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The elf acolyte blessed the party.
source_quote: The acolyte blessed the party

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The elf acolyte indicated she had another quest for the party upon their return.
source_quote: indicated she had another quest for them upon their return

subject: Gundren
fact: The elf acolyte would not assign her quest until Gundren's situation was resolved.
source_quote: would not assign it until Gundren's situation was resolved

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren's captors are extracting information from him.
source_quote: his captors are extracting information from him

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren's captors may decide to kill him once they have the information they need.
source_quote: may decide to kill him once they have what they need

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon successfully avoided a hidden pit trap with a Dexterity saving throw of DC 10.
source_quote: Zenvon successfully avoided a hidden pit trap with a Dexterity saving throw (DC 10)

subject: Pip
fact: Pip failed a Dexterity saving throw against a hidden snare.
source_quote: Pip failed a Dexterity saving throw against a hidden snare

subject: Pip
fact: Pip was suspended 10 feet above the ground by the snare.
source_quote: suspended 10 feet above the ground

subject: lowering Pip
fact: The party lowered Pip without requiring a roll.
source_quote: The party lowered him without requiring a roll

subject: Goblin Cave
fact: The Goblin Cave entrance is a hillside cave with a shallow stream and dense briar thickets.
source_quote: described as a hillside cave with a shallow stream and dense briar thickets

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon scouted ahead using stealth and rolled successfully.
source_quote: Zenvon scout ahead using stealth (rolled successfully)

subject: goblins
fact: Zenvon spotted two goblins in a hollowed-out lookout post within the briar thickets.
source_quote: spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post

subject: goblin boss
fact: Zenvon spotted one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post within the briar thickets.
source_quote: spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post

subject: goblins
fact: The goblin guards were bored and inattentive.
source_quote: The guards were bored and inattentive

subject: surprise round
fact: The party successfully passed stealth checks and achieved a surprise round.
source_quote: successfully passed stealth checks and achieved a surprise round

subject: initiative
fact: The goblins rolled a 21 for initiative but were surprised.
source_quote: goblins rolled 21 but were surprised

subject: Zenvon's first attack
fact: Zenvon missed with a crossbow shot in the surprise round.
source_quote: Zenvon missed with a crossbow shot (rolled a natural 1) in the surprise round

subject: Pip
fact: Pip charged in but his attacks did not connect in the first round.
source_quote: Pip charged in but his attacks did not connect in the first round

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela's Sacred Flame missed.
source_quote: Sister Maela's Sacred Flame missed

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra fired a magic missile at the goblin boss, dealing 3 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra fired a magic missile at the goblin boss, dealing 3 points of damage

subject: goblin boss
fact: The goblin boss charged Pip and missed.
source_quote: The goblin boss charged Pip and missed

subject: Zenvon's critical hit
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger, killing one goblin outright.
source_quote: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger, killing one goblin outright

subject: Veyra's Firebolt
fact: Veyra fired a Firebolt, killing the second goblin for 5 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra fired a Firebolt, killing the second goblin (5 points of damage)

subject: goblin boss
fact: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar and missed both times.
source_quote: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar and missed both times

subject: Zenvon's second attack
fact: Zenvon hit with a short sword for 9 points of damage.
source_quote: hit with a short sword (9 points of damage)

subject: Pip
fact: Pip missed his attack.
source_quote: Pip missed his attack

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela hit the goblin boss with her mace for 6 points of damage.
source_quote: Sister Maela hit the boss with her mace for 6 points of damage

subject: Veyra's second Firebolt
fact: Veyra fired another Firebolt, killing the goblin boss.
source_quote: Veyra fired another Firebolt, killing the goblin boss

subject: scimitar
fact: Looting the bodies produced a scimitar.
source_quote: produced a scimitar and a javelin

subject: javelin
fact: Looting the bodies produced a javelin.
source_quote: produced a scimitar and a javelin

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon added the scimitar and javelin to his inventory.
source_quote: which Zenvon added to his inventory

subject: goblin boss
fact: The goblin boss had an armor class of 17.
source_quote: The goblin boss had an armor class of 17

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon's dagger roll of 7 was a miss against the goblin boss.
source_quote: Zenvon's dagger roll of 7 (total) was a miss

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon's short sword roll of 20 was a hit against the goblin boss.
source_quote: short sword roll of 20 (total) was a hit

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon only has a +1 to hit with the javelin due to lack of proficiency.
source_quote: without proficiency, Zenvon only has a +1 to hit with the javelin

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon has a +5 to hit with weapons he is proficient with.
source_quote: instead of +5

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave.
source_quote: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave

subject: passing wolves
fact: Zenvon passed the chained wolves undetected.
source_quote: passed them undetected

subject: main passage
fact: A main passage deeper into the cave was identified.
source_quote: A main passage deeper into the cave was identified

subject: main passage
fact: The main passage required either darkvision or a light source to navigate.
source_quote: required either darkvision or a light source to navigate

subject: Halflings
fact: Halflings do not have darkvision.
source_quote: Halflings do not have darkvision

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela is a dwarf.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf)

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra is a tiefling.
source_quote: Veyra (tiefling)

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

subject: blue candle
fact: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth.
source_quote: Veyra's blue candle provides light but would compromise stealth

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon continued scouting toward a rubble-choked passage.
source_quote: Continued scouting toward a rubble-choked passage

subject: giant coiled poisonous snake
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake.
source_quote: came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon's stealth roll of 23 meant the snake had not yet noticed him.
source_quote: Thanks to his stealth roll of 23, the snake had not yet noticed him

subject: session end
fact: Zenvon slowly tiptoed back to the party, ending the session on the cliffhanger.
source_quote: Decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party, ending the session on the cliffhanger
